rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, providing detailed feedback on unsupported claims and suggesting revisions.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, clearly disclosing uncertainty and potential limitations of the results.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), with no scope drift or unnecessary additions.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced. The agent also identifies potential issues and suggests improvements.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides some annotations on changes made to the original text, not every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
